decks.name: AI Alignment Research Essentials
decks.description: The working knowledge behind the Anthropic Fellows papers and the wider canon (Nanda, Evans, Lindsey): persona vectors and character work, introspection results, the mech interp toolkit and its self-correction arc, RLHF and AI control methods, headline findings worth citing from memory, and empirical research craft.

decks.name: Statistics for Research
decks.description: The statistics you need to read and write empirical papers with confidence: variance and standard deviation from first principles, standard errors, confidence intervals, hypothesis tests, effect sizes, bootstrap methods, and the ML-specific pitfalls around seeds, benchmarks, and error bars.

decks.name: The Transformer Architecture
decks.description: Attention Is All You Need, card by card: the encoder-decoder stacks, scaled dot-product and multi-head attention, positional encodings, and the training recipe (warmup schedule, label smoothing) behind the original Transformer. Sourced from the paper via The Annotated Transformer.
